prompt: Using the FIRST reference image as the scroll base, keep the rolled yellow-beige parchment scroll, copper buckle, tilted 3D angle, colors, lighting, and transparent background. MODIFY the brown leather strap: make it noticeably WIDER/THICKER (approximately 1.5x wider than reference) so it dominates the middle section of the scroll and has more surface area. ADD large bold uppercase 'EXP' text EMBOSSED AND BRANDED INTO the leather strap surface — the text must look like it is physically PART OF the leather (pressed/stamped/carved into the strap with 3D depth, with subtle leather-texture on the letter surface, shadows where letters meet the strap), NOT floating in front. Text style matches the SECOND reference image: chunky golden-yellow gradient letters (bright warm yellow top, rich orange-gold bottom) with thick dark brown outline rim that blends naturally into the leather, slight inner highlight on each letter, strong shadow inside the embossed recess. Text sizing: fills about 75% of the strap's widened front face width, the letters' top and bottom edges can slightly extend just past the strap's edges (maybe 10-15% overlap onto the parchment), but the MAJORITY of each letter sits ON the leather. Each letter should have a visible contact shadow / leather indent around its base to sell the embossed look. ONE SINGLE scroll icon, transparent background, no watermark, no extra text, centered composition, same tilt as reference.
